user_query:
I’m a VC preparing a concise internal update on how containerization is improving efficiency and scalability across four portfolio companies. Using the provided files under input/, please do the following and save all outputs under output/:

1) Extract and reconcile structured portfolio data from input/meeting_notes.md and input/company_updates.csv. Produce both output/portfolio_containerization_summary.csv and output/portfolio_containerization_summary.json with one record per company and these fields:
- company (string)
- stage (string)
- containerization_level (one of: pilot|partial|full; normalize to lowercase)
- orchestrator (string; use "None" if there is no orchestrator)
- primary_cloud (string)
- efficiency_metric_pct (number; numeric percent without % sign)
- scalability_note (string; concise summary)
- source_files (CSV: semicolon-separated list of source filenames; JSON: array of source filenames)
- conflict_note (string; empty if no conflict)

Reconciliation rules:
- If a field appears in both sources and values differ, prefer company_updates.csv. Record the differing value from meeting_notes.md in conflict_note in the form "notes FIELD='value' vs csv FIELD='value'" (include only the fields that conflict).
- If a field is missing/blank in company_updates.csv, extract it from meeting_notes.md.
- For efficiency_metric_pct: use the value from company_updates.csv if present; otherwise extract from meeting_notes.md. When multiple percentages are mentioned in the notes, prefer an infrastructure cost reduction; if none, use the first numeric percent mentioned. Strip the % sign and output a number.

2) Rewrite the informal notes in input/raw_messages.txt for tone, clarity, and brevity. Preserve the original intent and any proper names, do not introduce new commitments, and keep each rewritten message under 60 words. Output them in the same order, separated by a blank line, to output/rewritten_messages.txt.

3) Draft an email to my partner summarizing what we’re seeing. Save to output/email_to_partner.md with:
- A clear, informative subject line
- A body of 150–220 words, concise and professional
- A bullet list of the top 3 companies by efficiency_metric_pct from output/portfolio_containerization_summary.csv, in descending order. Each bullet must include: company name, efficiency_metric_pct (with % sign), containerization_level, and orchestrator
- A one-sentence next-step ask
Use only data from the generated CSV/JSON; do not invent numbers.

Inputs:
- input/meeting_notes.md
- input/company_updates.csv
- input/raw_messages.txt

Outputs:
- output/portfolio_containerization_summary.csv
- output/portfolio_containerization_summary.json
- output/rewritten_messages.txt
- output/email_to_partner.md All file paths are relative to the workspace directory.
